color_palette.primary: Earthy tones such as sage green, moss, and terracotta

typography.heading: Friendly, approachable fonts such as Lato and Merriweather

logo_concept: A stylized leaf with a subtle, hand-painted feel, accompanied by a clean and modern sans-serif font
brand_voice: Nourish Your Space, Nurture Your Soul

sample_usage.website_headline: Welcome to Petal & Leaf, where you can nurture your love of plants and find tranquility in the heart of the city.
sample_usage.instagram_bio: From rare and exotic plants to expert advice and beautiful plant arrangements, we're here to help you bring balance and serenity into your life.
